case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. FERNANDO DA SILVA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-06-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT HAS PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LEINA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASST. COLLECTION DEPT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
